options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies that all objects will be dehighlighted.

options.name: -index
options.description: Specifies that the objects with the index value provided will be dehighlighted.

options.name: -original
options.description: Highlight the object through original color.

options.name: -select
options.description: Specifies that all selected objects will be dehighlighted.
